name: Fiesta Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds chicken breast, no skin, no bone, R-T-C
15 ounces black beans, canned, rinsed and drained
4 ounces diced green chiles, canned, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder, and chili powder in a paper or plastic bag.
2. Shake chicken breasts, a few pieces at a time, in the flour mixture until well coated.
3. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Cook chicken in hot oil about 10 minutes or until chicken is lightly browned, turning to brown evenly.
5. Drain off fat.
6. Combine black beans, undrained tomatoes, chiles, green pepper, onion, olives, and garlic powder in a mixing bowl; mix well.
7. Pour bean mixture over chicken in skillet.
8. Bring to boiling, then reduce heat.
9. Simmer, covered, about 40 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
10. Serve over hot cooked rice.
